_doc: 投稿前强制报告规范 checklist。按 research_field + target_journal 自动挂对应清单。Phase 4.8 必跑。

Nature: Life Sciences Reporting Summary if biomedical
Cell: no separate checklist but STAR Methods mandatory

ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.item: Study design — groups, allocation, randomization, blinding
ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.must_report: exp groups + control + n per group + randomization method + blinding method (or N/A)

ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.item: Sample size — total n + per-group n + power justification

ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.must_report: blinded to group during data collection AND analysis
test name + assumption check (normality/variance) + multiple comparison correction

ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.item: Experimental animals — species + strain + sex + age + weight + source
ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.must_report: every field, no defaults like 'adult mice'

ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.item: Results — descriptive stats + measure of variability + n per analysis
ARRIVE_2.0_essential_10.must_report: absolute numbers + mean ± SD/SEM (specify which) + n for each panel

CONSORT_2010_core.item: Intervention details for each group (so it could be replicated)
Primary + secondary outcome measures, defined a priori
Randomization sequence — method, type (block, stratified), allocation concealment
CONSORT flow diagram — enrollment, allocation, follow-up, analysis
Number analyzed per group, intention-to-treat vs per-protocol
Effect size + 95% CI for primary outcome

MIQE_2009_qPCR.item: Reverse transcriptase — kit, RNA input amount, priming method
qPCR primer sequences + amplicon size + Tm
qPCR efficiency calculation per primer pair (95-105% acceptable)
Cq calculation method (auto threshold vs second derivative)
Melting curve analysis + gel verification for SYBR
Statistical analysis — non-parametric for small n

PRISMA_2020_systematic_review: Database list + search dates + last search date
Number of records at each stage (identification → screening → eligibility → included)
Risk of bias assessment per included study (RoB 2.0 / ROBINS-I)
ML_reproducibility_neurips: Model architecture + hyperparameters + number of parameters
Random seed + multiple runs (mean ± std over ≥3 seeds)
Compute (GPU type + training time + total compute estimate)
Baseline comparisons — same data + same eval protocol
